title_en: DualSense Controllers Are Down to Low as $55 Again Thanks to Target Resurrecting the Deal – Save on Gray Camo, Sterling Silver, and More
summary_en: Target has dropped the price on a selection of DualSense controllers as low as $55. Save on the Gray Camo, Sterling Silver, and more controller colors.
body_en:
Amazon's big Prime Day sale may be next week, but it's not the only retailer with discounts worth looking through. Target has some surprise savings up its sleeve as well, particularly right now for PlayStation 5 users. At the moment, a selection of DualSense controllers have been discounted at the retailer, dropping as low as $55.
As for which DualSense controllers have been discounted, the Gray Camo , Sterling Silver , Cobalt Blue , Chroma Indigo , and Chroma Pearl controllers are all on sale right now at the retailer.
The Gray Camo DualSense has dropped the lowest, down to $54.99, while the rest are all sitting at $59.99. You can see these prices after adding them to your shopping cart. In the case of the Gray Camo model, in particular, we last saw it at this price point during the Days of Play sale , so now is a great time to scoop it up if you missed out on that offer.
While these are a great pick-up for PlayStation 5 users, Target's big deals at the moment don't end there. The retailer has also dropped a sale on a selection of LEGO sets , so you can scoop up some new builds to work on this summer. Ahead of Prime Day, they're some pretty nice deals to take advantage of.
However, if you're looking forward to the big Amazon Prime Day sale event this year, you'll want to make sure your calendar is marked for June 23 to June 26. This four-day-long deal drop will include a wide variety of offerings for Prime members, so you'll want to make sure you're all signed up to take advantage of what's available. If you're curious about what kind of plans are available, check out our breakdown of Amazon Prime membership plans and prices for more information.
Hannah Hoolihan is a freelancer who writes with the guides and commerce teams here at IGN.
